description_long: This is a stylized adult figure dressed in a full-body spacesuit, featuring a prominent helmet with a transparent visor and a fitted, segmented design. The suit is primarily composed of two contrasting colors, with reinforced sections at the joints and limbs for added protection. The figure wears a large, structured backpack unit, likely representing a life-support or oxygen system, which is securely attached to the back. The gloves and boots are robust, with visible tread and articulation for mobility and grip. The face is visible through the helmet, showing a neutral expression and short, neatly styled hair. The overall appearance suggests a futuristic or sci-fi theme, suitable for space exploration or hazardous environments.
description: A stylized adult in a full-body spacesuit with a helmet, visible face, and a large backpack unit, designed for space or hazardous environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the helmeted face, segmented suit details, and articulated gloves and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the helmet profile, arm and leg contours, and the depth of the backpack unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full structure of the backpack, suit paneling, and reinforced boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the helmet, suit articulation, and backpack attachment.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted spacesuit with helmet, gloves, boots, and a structured backpack unit
